body_txt: Whether it is due to their gorgeous hair, delicate features, snazzy dressing, or fey nature, some boys get called "little lady" more often than they'd like. The opposite of Lady Looks Like a Dude , this trope involves male characters who, despite entirely identifying as male and making no effort to seem otherwise, are frequently mistaken for female (by other characters). Not to be confused with: Frequently results in Only Has Same-Sex Admirers if other guys keep falling for them, which will undoubtedly lead to an Unsettling Gender-Reveal . Or worse, a Crotch-Grab Sex Check . The difference is how much the other male(s) believes them to female ( The Crying Game versus any scene with Kazuki in Get Backers ). Named for the Aerosmith song, a Real Life example as it was allegedly written about Mötley Crüe frontman Vince Neil . Compare Ambiguous Gender and Bifauxnen . Could result in Viewer Gender Confusion . May be a Gendered Insult , if the implication is that looking like a lady is a bad thing. See also Elfeminate .
